testcase.name: test_get_pending_requests
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_signature_detection_and_notary.py:344: in test_get_pending_requests assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get pending requests: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get pending requests: {"detail":"Notarization request not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_get_assigned_requests
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_signature_detection_and_notary.py:367: in test_get_assigned_requests assert response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to get assigned requests: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to get assigned requests: {"detail":"Notarization request not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
